title: lasianthus elevatineurus
intro: Lasianthus elevatineurus, a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae, is a type of evergreen shrub native to tropical Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lasianthus elevatineurus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be made into a tea or infused in hot water to utilize its medicinal properties.
